1. Enter your tyre size

3. Fast delivery & fitting

angle_clarity.detail: LLM(haiku-cli): The price-value angle is clear and dominant—'Why pay more?' immediately establishes competitive pricing as the strategic position, reinforced by 'best brands for less' and the price match guarantee. Minor distractions exist (service quality testimonial, fast delivery mention) but don't confuse the primary message; a viewer clearly identifies the core angle as lowest-price access to quality brands.
